nl_query: Count critical audit log entries per week.
failed_sql:
SELECT ac.academic_year, ac.cal_date, COUNT(al.id) AS critical_count
FROM audit_log al
JOIN academic_calendar ac ON ac.id = al.created_at::date
WHERE al.is_critical = TRUE
GROUP BY ac.academic_year, ac.cal_date
ORDER BY ac.academic_year, ac.cal_date
error:
